results.rendered_html:
vi-ny-√as P. -asyati (rarely -asati), to put or place down in different places, spread out, distribute, arrange,  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.;
to put down, deposit, place or lay on, fix in, turn or direct towards, apply to (loc.),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to mark or designate by (instr.),  Megh. ;
to entrust or make over to (loc.),  Vikr.

results.rendered_html:
vinyas 4 P.
1 To put down, deposit, place; vinyasyaṃtī bhuvi gaṇanayā dehalīdattaṣuṣpaiḥ  Me. 87 ;  Bk. 3. 3. 
2 To fix in or on, direct towards; rāme vinyastamānasāḥ  Rām. 
3 To deliver or make over, commit to the care of, entrust; sutavinyastapatnīkaḥ  Y. 3. 45. 
4 To arrange, dispose, adjust.
